title: PlaybookMetadata
description: Per-playbook metadata governing dispatch policy. One entry per playbook .md file.

automation_mode.description: Jules session automation mode. AUTO_CREATE_PR means Jules opens the PR itself at end of session. null means omit the field from the request body and let Jules use its default.

require_plan_approval.description: Jules session plan-approval gate. When true (default), Jules pauses after producing a plan and waits for human approval before executing. AIGovClaw defaults to true because every playbook has a human-in-loop review gate by design.
